channel.title: Management on Rishipal Yadav · not your CISO
channel.description: Recent content in Management on Rishipal Yadav · not your CISO

item.title: Educate Your Team — Do Not Chase When It Comes to Security
item.description:
This article was originally published on not your CISO on Medium. Read the full post →

“Hey, could you please complete the security training, it was due two days ago?”

If that message sounds familiar — either as the person sending it or the one ignoring it — your security awareness program has a problem. And the problem isn’t that people are lazy or don’t care about security. The problem is that you’ve built a compliance exercise and called it a culture.
